tagline: Functions are now a supported securable object type for tagging in Unity Catalog.
what_it_does: Functions are now a supported securable object type for tagging in Unity Catalog. Use SET TAG and UNSET TAG to add and remove tags from functions. You can use tags to search for functions and certify or deprecate functions.
why_it_matters: Governed tags Governed tags are account level tags with enforced rules for consistency and control.
key_takeaway: Functions are now a supported securable object type for tagging in Unity Catalog.
